_doc: Cast + cue mapping for multi-voice rendering of the SEEM radio play via tools/voice-renderer/play.py. Voice keys are SPEAKER or SPEAKER@STREAM (DANIEL@HIM = Daniel's interior). 'fallback' redirects a key to another's voice. 'cueMap' turns *(delivery cues)* into eleven_v3 audio tags; unmapped cues are dropped. POC casting — swap voice_ids freely, the renderer re-renders only the changed character (voice_id is part of the cache key).

NARRATOR._who: Wren, years later, reconstructing — intimate, dry, close as a confession

DANIEL._who: the Man, out loud (SURFACE) — warm, ordinary, the one true human

DANIEL@HIM._who: Daniel's interior — same voice, warmer and fully-roomed

CHORD._who: the channel — cold, procedural, appraising; flat by design

VALA._who: the Mother — mild, grandmotherly, almost nothing there; Lear not monster

LISS._who: the Maiden — warm, easy, bright, younger

MAN._who: the opening lonely man — friendly surface, the colour turned down
